title: Custom Totems
description: Client-side mod to customize hand-held and popped Totem animation. Adjust scale, position, opacity, color, animation speed, and enable health-based color interpolation with customizable low and high health colors.
body:
**Custom Totems**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- # What it does! Client-side mod that lets you fully customize the Hand-Held and the Popped Totem animation. Adjust scale, position, opacity, tint, and animation settings. Includes optional health-based color interpolation that smoothly transitions between customizable low- and high-health colors. ---
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W0COwwxg/images/c557f5f5b627acd20e9ffba1cdc98a16758d921a.png) _there is also health based color looks like (You can change the color of both low and high health.)_
--- # Settings **Hand Held Totem Settings:** - Hand-held enabled toggle - Hand-held scale slider - Hand-held totem scale slider - Opacity slider - Height (Y) position slider - Left/right (X) position slider - Tint color selector (YACL color picker) - Toggle for Totem Pop Interpolation, which gradually transitions the totem’s color based on the player’s current health - Customizable good-health color (YACL color picker) - Customizable low-health color (YACL color picker) **Popped Totem Animation Settings:** - Popped enabled toggle - Animation scale slider - Animation speed slider Join my discord! [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
